examples: A person regarded as mentally dull; a dolt.
He's a first-class dolt who insists on doing things his way.
You can fight all day, but want dolt thinks he can beat God?
Reilly playing a hapless dolt who rises to the top by imitating every popular style at exactly the right moment, from Elvis to Dylan to the Fab Four.
Tye got us to Dolt Tower in about six hours.
